query:
-- Verificar quantas vendas foram atualizadas
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_vendas_baggio
FROM sales 
WHERE companyId = (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE name LIKE '%B I IMOVEIS%' LIMIT 1);
